description: grid-template-rows track sizing (fixed lengths, and fr shares of a definite container height) plus grid item block-axis alignment (align-items on the container, per-item align-self overrides).
visual_assertions: The fixed grid has an 80pt first row and a 40pt second row, so Rtwo starts 80pt below Rone.
In the 90pt-tall aligned row, Topper is top-aligned and Bottom is bottom-aligned (align-self overrides the container's align-items: center).
The fractional grid splits its 180pt height as 1fr (60pt) over 2fr (120pt), so Ftwo starts 60pt below Fone.
